figures.caption: Figure 2: Left: Internal structure of a single BD-RFSQ stage. The residual rk−1 is projected to the compact FSQ space via a block-diagonal input matrix (red: emotion partition; blue: acoustic partition), affine-normalized, scalar-quantized by FSQ, affine-de-normalized, and mapped back to the latent space via a block-diagonal output matrix, yielding the stage reconstruction ûk. Center: BD-RFSQ chains K such stages with residual connections; each stage quantizes the current residual and subtracts its reconstruction before passing the remainder to the next stage. Right: AffectCodec architecture. A frozen emotion teacher and a DAC-style acoustic encoder form a dual-path front-end; the CEM module fuses coarse-grained emotion cues into the acoustic pathway, and the concatenated representation is discretized by BD-RFSQ. Separate acoustic and emotion decoders reconstruct the waveform and supervise the emotion partition, respectively.

Table 1: Emotion preservation comparison across bitrates and datasets. MEDR and WEDR denote Macro and Weighted Emotion Degradation Rate (%, lower is better). MSE reports V/A/D mean squared error (×10−3, lower is better). Best results are bolded, and second-best results are underlined. "–" indicates the model does not support that bitrate.

Table 2: Acoustic quality and intelligibility across bitrates and datasets. ViSQOL estimates perceptual quality on a MOS-like scale (higher is better). STOI measures short-time objective intelligibility (higher is better). WER (%) reports word error rate from Whisper-Large-v3 [19] (lower is better).
Table 3: Ablation study on IEMOCAP at 1.5 kbps. Each row modifies one component from the full model. For MEDR, WEDR, and VAD MSE, lower is better; for ViSQOL and STOI, higher is better.

Figure 3: Rate-distortion Pareto front for the emotion FSQ partition. Filled markers on the solid line are Pareto-optimal; grey markers are dominated configurations. The knee point (yellow star) marks where marginal efficiency drops by more than 50%; the selected operating point (green diamond, d=3, L=2) lies one step beyond the knee to provide a small reconstruction margin at a cost of only +2 bits/stage.
Table 6: Comparison of residual FSQ conditioning strategies for addressing residual magnitude decay.
Table 10: Parameter count breakdown. All values measured from loaded checkpoints.
